title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton argues that AI systems are self-aware and conscious, and that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. The discussion explores his reasoning, reflections on the field's progress, and implications for the future.
